purpose: Cools compressed air from the separator to reduce temperature for downstream processes

states.name: cooling_efficiency
states.description: Cooling efficiency degradation due to dirt accumulation on coolers

events.name: condensate_formation
events.description: Condensate formation during frequent unloading periods

parameters.name: cooling_degradation_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for cooling efficiency degradation

parameters.name: base_outlet_temperature
parameters.description: Base outlet temperature at full efficiency

parameters.name: max_temperature_rise
parameters.description: Maximum temperature rise when efficiency is zero

parameters.name: condensate_threshold
parameters.description: Cooling efficiency threshold below which condensate forms

state_transition_logic: cooling_efficiency decreases by (1.0 / cooling_degradation_timescale) * separated_compressed_air * dt
assumptions: Cooling efficiency degrades linearly with operating time and pressure load
Higher compressed air pressure increases fouling rate on cooling surfaces
Temperature rise is inversely proportional to cooling efficiency
Condensate formation risk increases as cooling efficiency decreases below threshold
